subcodes.first_line: O spiritual one! A few days ago a letter was written and dispatched, and today through His Holiness the martyred son [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای روحانی چند روز پیش نامه مرقوم و ارسال گردید و الیوم بواسطه حضرت شهید ابن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
